nasb.text: When she becomes clean from her discharge, she shall count off for herself seven days; and afterward she will be clean.

esv.text: But if she is cleansed of her discharge, she shall count for herself seven days, and after that she shall be clean.

cnv.text: 女人的血漏若是潔淨了，她要計算七天，然後就潔淨了。

ccb.text: 血漏停止后，她要等七天才洁净。
